tasks.name: Route Guidance Through Runtime Contract
tasks.summary: Replaced duplicated phase routing with specdev next --json handoffs while preserving gates and reviewloop behavior.

tasks.name: Thin Breakdown And Implementation Task Model
tasks.summary: Introduced concise task contracts, task modes, test budgets, and prune-and-replace testing guidance.

tasks.name: Make Knowledge Capture Optional Phase-End Guidance
tasks.summary: Removed required capture runtime phase and made knowledge capture optional non-blocking phase-end guidance.

tasks.name: Documentation And Contract Drift Cleanup
tasks.summary: Updated docs, guides, indexes, and tests to match the three-phase workflow and legacy distill positioning.
